changes.before: Supplier marked with the same symbol she had seen elsewhere now often enough to hate it on sight
changes.after: Supplier marked with a symbol she did not know yet

changes.before: He had been riding south into this same web of roads.
changes.after: He had come north out of this same web of roads.

changes.before: He had known more than he should have for a harmless man with an empty wagon, speaking with the easy detail of someone who lived on these roads. She had not yet known grain was the carrier, or that watchers stood on the roads with poison in their teeth, or that the whole thing reached wider than one dead village. It had been her best read, and it still irritated her.
changes.after: He had known these roads the way road men did, by bridge conditions, flour shortages, and who bought heavy before weather turned. She had not yet known grain was the carrier, or that watchers stood on the roads with poison in their teeth, or that the whole thing reached wider than one dead village. It had been a fair read then. It still irritated her now.
